summary: Iteration 33 - Testing sidebar restructure with ΣΥΛΛΟΓΟΣ and ΑΚΑΔΗΜΙΑ sections, scoped opponents/venues. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - sidebar structure correct, dashboards load, opponents/venues CRUD works with team_type scoping.
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefixed items)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar restructure verified: 1) ΣΥΛΛΟΓΟΣ section has sub-items: Ομάδες, Αντίπαλοι, Γήπεδα. 2) ΑΚΑΔΗΜΙΑ section has sub-items: Ομάδες, Εγγραφές, Αντίπαλοι, Γήπεδα. 3) Standalone Ημερολόγιο and Παρουσίες are NOT in sidebar. 4) Clicking section headers shows SectionDashboard with calendar and stats. 5) Club opponents/venues use team_type='First Team', Academy uses team_type='Academy'. 6) Backend filtering by team_type works correctly.

sidebar_club_section.details: ΣΥΛΛΟΓΟΣ group header exists with sub-items: Ομάδες, Αντίπαλοι, Γήπεδα (data-testid: admin-group-club_section, admin-tab-teams, admin-tab-club_opponents, admin-tab-club_venues)

sidebar_academy_section.details: ΑΚΑΔΗΜΙΑ group header exists with sub-items: Ομάδες, Εγγραφές, Αντίπαλοι, Γήπεδα (data-testid: admin-group-academy_section, admin-tab-academy, admin-tab-registrations, admin-tab-academy_opponents, admin-tab-academy_venues)

standalone_calendar_attendance_removed.details: Standalone Ημερολόγιο and Παρουσίες are NOT present in sidebar

club_dashboard.details: Clicking ΣΥΛΛΟΓΟΣ header shows Club Dashboard with calendar and stats (data-testid: club-dashboard)

academy_dashboard.details: Clicking ΑΚΑΔΗΜΙΑ header shows Academy Dashboard with calendar and stats (data-testid: academy-dashboard)

club_opponents_create.details: Club Αντίπαλοι page can create opponent with name (team_type=First Team). Title shows 'ΑΝΤΙΠΑΛΟΙ ΣΥΛΛΟΓΟΥ'

club_venues_create.details: Club Γήπεδα page can create venue with name + Google Maps link (team_type=First Team). Title shows 'ΓΗΠΕΔΑ ΣΥΛΛΟΓΟΥ'

academy_opponents_create.details: Academy Αντίπαλοι page creates opponents with team_type=Academy. Title shows 'ΑΝΤΙΠΑΛΟΙ ΑΚΑΔΗΜΙΑΣ'

academy_venues_create.details: Academy Γήπεδα page creates venues with team_type=Academy. Title shows 'ΓΗΠΕΔΑ ΑΚΑΔΗΜΙΑΣ' with subtitle 'Κοινά γήπεδα για όλες τις ομάδες ακαδημίας'

backend_opponents_filter.details: GET /api/admin/opponents?team_type=Academy returns only Academy opponents. GET /api/admin/opponents?team_type=First%20Team returns only First Team opponents.

backend_facilities_filter.details: GET /api/admin/facilities?team_type=First%20Team returns only First Team venues. GET /api/admin/facilities?team_type=Academy returns only Academy venues.

scoped_separation.details: Club opponents are NOT visible in Academy opponents page and vice versa - verified via backend API filtering

calendar_in_dashboard.details: Calendar shows in SectionDashboard with upcoming events and day-click detail view

mocked_apis.twilio_sms: OTP returned in API response debug field for testing
